divisions.title: Birth and Preparation
divisions.summary: Genealogy, birth narratives, baptism by John, and temptation in the wilderness

divisions.title: Sermon on the Mount
divisions.summary: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes, the Law fulfilled, prayer, worry, and judging others

divisions.title: Authority in Action
divisions.summary: Jesus demonstrates authority through miracles, healings, and sending out the twelve disciples

divisions.title: Parables of the Kingdom
divisions.summary: John's question, Sabbath controversies, and parables of the sower, weeds, mustard seed, and more

divisions.title: Discipleship and Identity
divisions.summary: Feeding of five thousand, walking on water, Peter's confession, and the transfiguration

divisions.title: Teaching on Community
divisions.summary: Humility, forgiveness, marriage, children, wealth, and the vineyard workers

divisions.title: Confrontation in Jerusalem
divisions.summary: Triumphal entry, temple cleansing, debates with Pharisees, and woes pronounced

divisions.title: Olivet Discourse
divisions.summary: Signs of the end, the coming of the Son of Man, and parables of readiness

divisions.title: Passion and Resurrection
divisions.summary: The Last Supper, betrayal and arrest, trial, crucifixion, burial, and resurrection

chapterSummaries.1: The genealogy of Jesus Christ and his birth to Mary
chapterSummaries.2: Wise men visit, flight to Egypt, and return to Nazareth
chapterSummaries.3: John the Baptist prepares the way and baptizes Jesus
chapterSummaries.4: Jesus is tempted by Satan and begins his ministry in Galilee
chapterSummaries.5: The Beatitudes and teaching on the Law and righteousness
chapterSummaries.6: Teaching on giving, prayer, fasting, and trust in God
chapterSummaries.7: Judging others, ask and seek, narrow gate, and wise builder
chapterSummaries.8: Jesus heals a leper, centurion's servant, and calms the storm
chapterSummaries.9: Jesus heals a paralytic, calls Matthew, and raises a girl
chapterSummaries.10: Jesus sends out the twelve apostles with authority to heal and preach
chapterSummaries.11: John's question, woe to unrepentant cities, and Jesus' invitation to rest
chapterSummaries.12: Lord of the Sabbath, healing and Pharisees' blasphemy
chapterSummaries.13: Parables of the sower, weeds, mustard seed, treasure, and pearl
chapterSummaries.14: John the Baptist beheaded, feeding of five thousand, walking on water
chapterSummaries.15: Teaching on what defiles, faith of the Canaanite woman, feeding four thousand
chapterSummaries.16: Pharisees demand a sign, Peter confesses Jesus as the Christ
chapterSummaries.17: The transfiguration, healing of demon-possessed boy, temple tax
chapterSummaries.18: Teaching on humility, dealing with sin, and the parable of the unmerciful servant
chapterSummaries.19: Teaching on divorce, blessing children, and the rich young ruler
chapterSummaries.20: Parable of the vineyard workers and the request of James and John
chapterSummaries.21: Triumphal entry, cleansing the temple, and cursing the fig tree
chapterSummaries.22: Parables and debates about taxes, resurrection, and the greatest commandment
chapterSummaries.23: Seven woes to the Pharisees and teachers of the law
chapterSummaries.24: Signs of the end times and the coming of the Son of Man
chapterSummaries.25: Parables of the ten virgins, talents, and the sheep and goats
chapterSummaries.26: The Last Supper, Gethsemane, betrayal, and trial before the Sanhedrin
chapterSummaries.27: Trial before Pilate, crucifixion, death, and burial of Jesus
chapterSummaries.28: The resurrection, the Great Commission, and Jesus' ascension
